0jbrb1dcbliiampz.question: How many years had investments of over 22 Billion Euros in the years 2011 to 2014?

steps.text: Restrict attention to the bars for the years 2011 through 2014.
Keep the bars whose investments value is greater than 22 on the y-axis.
Count the qualifying years.

11e148qcs7x70t8v.question: in which years does south korea have a bigger value than france?

steps.text: Compare the South Korea and France segments within each Period.
List the Periods where South Korea's segment is taller than France's.

66va2s35es5t86l3.question: What is the year with the largest increase compared to the previous year?

steps.text: Calculate the year-over-year increase in “In millions” between adjacent years.
Select the later year of the pair with the largest increase (2010).

0gvrmm8qbn6o1vya.question: What is the average of Season's ticket prices with a ticket price of $60 or less?

steps.text: Filter the bars to the seasons priced at or below $60.
Average those filtered ticket prices.

10gtgmmgh599jnr7.question: What is the difference between the second largest and the smallest values between 2000 and 2008?

steps.text: Filter the chart to the years 2000–2008 and find the smallest value.
Within the same range, find the second-largest value.
Subtract the smallest from the second-largest.

1k8qhmg9rui7gtzh.question: What is the difference between the largest value in Germany and the smallest value in the U.S. between 2010 and 2015?

steps.text: Filter the chart to the years 2010 through 2015 inclusive.
Find Germany's maximum favorable-view percentage in that range.
Find the U.S. minimum favorable-view percentage in that range.
Subtract the U.S. minimum from the Germany maximum.

0wflwm4jebx7n12y.question: What is the difference between the average and the maximum number?

steps.text: Find the maximum bar height in the chart.
Calculate the average of the “Number of fires” values across all years.
Subtract the average from the maximum.

0lua5jsw92d3enb4.question: How many diet types surpassed the threshold of 0.03% in 2019?

steps.text: Focus on the bars for the year 2019 across all diet-type panels.
Keep the 2019 bars whose share is strictly greater than 0.03.
Count the diet types that surpass the threshold.

0egzejn5mejtnfdm.question: What is the difference between Scotland's largest value and England and Wales's smallest value?

steps.text: Find Scotland's highest SharePercentage across the response-category panels.
Find England & Wales's lowest SharePercentage across the same panels.
Subtract the smaller value from the larger.

1a09xqtrj8zms716.question: What is the average value of top 3 malls' per square foot cost?

steps.text: Read off the top three malls' values by US dollars per square foot.
Add the three values and divide by three to get the average.

2eiyyw562tcvjypp.question: How many years has Russia had higher favorability than the US?

steps.text: Compare the Russia and US favorable-view percentages for each year.
Keep the years where Russia's value is greater than the US value.
Count those years.

2s65jcap9pn289qx.question: What is the sum of the differences between women and men in the last five years?

steps.text: Restrict the chart to the last five years (2016 through 2020).
Subtract the men's value from the women's value for each of those years.
Sum those five yearly differences.

0prhtod4tli879nh.question: Which city had the biggest jump in population from 2010 to 2025?

steps.text: Compute each city's population change from its 2010 bar to its 2025 bar.
Select the city with the largest increase (Delhi).

0vmvmj77j3p6vcy7.question: What is the net income sum from 2010 to 2015?

steps.text: Select the bars for the years 2010 through 2015 inclusive.
Add their “Net income in USD” values together.

2bhsybiilde28j87.question: What is the average percentage of non-black races that they answered very interested?

steps.text: Take the “Very interested” segment values for the non-black races (White, Hispanic, Other).
Average those three values.

8chfa8n079zpfigi.question: How many years correspond to a value between 20 and 30?

steps.text: Filter to the years whose FIFA World Ranking position is between 20 and 30 inclusive.
Count the remaining year points.

77xb5ug5lhfmkb74.question: What is the sum of number of employees from Europe region before 2015?

steps.text: Filter to the Europe-region segments (Germany, Great Britain, Spain, Rest of Europe) for the years before 2015.
Sum the Number_of_Employees across those regions and years.

avwb8xstxx1lmfpk.question: What is the Year that has the biggest deviation from the total average?

steps.text: Calculate the overall average Consumer Price Index across all plotted months.
Measure each point's deviation from the overall average.
Select the year with the largest deviation.

16aphfabldrpgcmd.question: What is the sum of the number of weights exceeding 3670 in the Boys group and the number of weights exceeding 3550 in the Girls group?

steps.text: Filter to the Boys group and count the years where the weight exceeds 3670.
Filter to the Girls group and count the years where the weight exceeds 3550.
Add the two counts together.

20qa83ih1gn6toqt.question: Which year shows the lowest gap between convenience and price?

steps.text: For each year, take the absolute difference between the Convenience and Price values.
Find the year with the smallest gap (2013).

0rfuaawgi58ajpsv.question: What is the difference in the average between North America and Latin America?

steps.text: Average the North America values across all years.
Average the Latin America values across all years.
Subtract the Latin America average from the North America average.

01mksjs373fhcl4q.question: Which sector showed the most decline?

steps.text: Within each sector's panel, subtract the mid-2013 bar from the 2003 bar to get the decline.
Select the sector with the largest drop (Large companies).

10t8o5vhethzeod1.question: In which year was the agriculture sector the highest

steps.text: Isolate the Agriculture-colored segment in each year's stacked bar.
Select the year whose Agriculture segment is tallest.

21fa7gb8l1ix6yfm.question: Which method shows the highest difference between every day and less often?

steps.text: For each method, take the absolute difference between the “EVERY DAY” and “LESS OFTEN” segments.
Select the method with the largest gap.

95yhyqjyeu4fohbj.question: Is the average of the minimum and maximum values greater compared to the value in 2010?

steps.text: Find the minimum (1.88 in 2000) and maximum (2.71 in 2020) values.
Average those two values to get 2.295.
Compare that average to the 2010 value (2.39): 2.295 is not greater, so No.

11e148qccorrect.question: in which years does south korea have a bigger value than france?

steps.text: Compare South Korea and France in each period (South Korea minus France).
Keep the periods where South Korea is actually ahead (difference above 0): 2016, 2017, 2018, and Jan-Oct 2019. In 2014 and 2015 France is higher, so they do not count.

e6q3stacked.question: which year had the lowest amount of suicides of all ages combined?

steps.text: Stack the age groups within each year so each bar shows that year's combined total.
Select the year with the lowest combined total — 2019 (746).
